segments.original_text: いや偉いですよねこれもね

segments.text: Man, you really want to go for it
segments.original_text: 本当に撃ちたくなっちゃう

segments.text: That's the KO if Rage connects!
segments.original_text: 撃墜ですもんレイジ当たったら

full_text: Yeah, that's impressive too, right Man, you really want to go for it That's the KO if Rage connects! Making the comeback here Incredible

corrections.original: 劇中ですもんレイジ当たったら
corrections.corrected: 撃墜ですもんレイジ当たったら
